title: Update Projects/SubDAOs cards: remove TMU-Notes-WST and add TeleMeetUp & TMU-Notes first

requirements.text: On the Projects/SubDAOs page (frontend/src/pages/ProjectsPage.tsx), remove the project card for "TMU-Notes WST" by deleting the staticProjects entry whose name is "TMU-Notes-WST" so it no longer appears anywhere on the page.

quotes: Find "TMU-Notes WST" card and delete it completely.

acceptanceCriteria: The "TMU-Notes-WST" card is not rendered anywhere on the Projects/SubDAOs page.
No other existing project cards are removed or reordered (except as needed to insert the new first card in REQ-4).

requirements.text:
On the Projects/SubDAOs page (frontend/src/pages/ProjectsPage.tsx), add a new project card as the FIRST item in the staticProjects list (so it appears before "Morshid") with:
- Title (project.name): "TeleMeetUp & TMU-Notes"
- Description (project.description), preserving line breaks and bullets exactly as user provided:
"TeleMeetUp is a one-stop teleconferencing solution with AI-powered features:
- Recording, Transcription & Translation (100+ languages)
- AI Assistant & Summarization
- Whiteboard & Screen Sharing
- Connect with anyone with or without the app
- Dial out to any phone number"
- A single button labeled "Watch Video" that opens https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=pk2TtlglNno in a new tab/window.

Implement the "Watch Video" button using the existing card button rendering pattern on this page (e.g., set websiteUrl to the YouTube link and set customButtonText to "Watch Video"), without altering global styling or other cards.

quotes: Add a new card called "TeleMeetUp & TMU-Notes" in the FIRST position (before Morshid).
Add a button "Watch Video" that opens this link in a new tab: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=pk2TtlglNno

acceptanceCriteria: A new card titled "TeleMeetUp & TMU-Notes" appears as the first card in the grid (before "Morshid").
The new card displays the provided description text with bullets visible/readable.
The card includes a button labeled exactly "Watch Video".
Clicking "Watch Video" opens https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=pk2TtlglNno in a new browser tab/window (target="_blank" with rel="noopener noreferrer").
No other page content, card styling, hover behavior, or existing buttons/links are changed.

constraints: Start from the last published version as the baseline.
Frontend only; do not introduce backend changes for this request.
Do not change anything else on the Projects/SubDAOs page beyond removing the "TMU-Notes-WST" card and adding the new first-position "TeleMeetUp & TMU-Notes" card with the specified button/link.
nonGoals: Creating or modifying any backend (Motoko) functionality.
Changing the layout, theme, colors, typography, or interactions of the Projects/SubDAOs page beyond the specified card removal/addition.
Adding new routes or navigation changes.
